author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Root cause: from_operation(TensorStorage::cpu(data)).to(device) injects ToDeviceBackward which moves gradients to CPU during backward. Upstream grad_fns have GPU saved tensors → device mismatch crash. Fix: upload data to GPU storage BEFORE wrapping with from_operation, same pattern as Embedding CL-213. Only affects forward-path from_operation calls, not backward .to(device) on gradient leaves.
